hero_subtitle: SFTY helps payment providers aggregate wallet risk signals and transaction data into one compliance operating layer for audit-ready review and linked case workflows.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Wallet risk reviews slow under siloed outputs
problem_description: Payment providers face fragmented wallet screening data that creates gaps between transaction monitoring, risk signals, and case workflows. This fragmentation leads to slower risk assessments, duplicated efforts, and challenges in providing a clear audit trail for compliance teams.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates wallet screening data, transaction risk insights, and provider outputs into unified cases, enabling payment providers to accelerate reviews, reduce duplication, and maintain an auditable compliance trail.
workflow_title: From wallet risk signals to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY consolidates wallet risk data, applies rules, routes alerts into reviewable cases and preserves evidence for compliance decisions and reporting workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond wallet alerts. One review layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides payment providers a unified compliance layer that links wallet risk, transactions, alerts and cases into structured review workflows with audit-ready evidence.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports payment providers managing wallet risk with provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence and enterprise deployment safeguards from the first deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how wallet risk signals connect to payment cases

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for payment providers?
faq_1_answer: SFTY helps payment providers connect wallet risk, transaction monitoring, sanctions exposure and provider outputs into one structured compliance control layer.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support wallet risk screening?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates wallet screening and transaction risk data, links alerts to customers and cases, and applies internal rules to support efficient compliance workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves evidence history, decision logs and case records, enabling compliance teams to maintain detailed, auditable trails for regulatory review and internal governance.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY can connect with multiple KYT, blockchain analytics, sanctions screening and transaction monitoring providers without replacing existing tools, enhancing workflow coherence.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace wallet screening providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above wallet screening and monitoring providers, structuring their outputs into cases, decisions and reports without replacing the underlying compliance tools.
final_title: Connect wallet risk to audit-ready cases
final_description: Review how SFTY brings wallet screening, transaction monitoring and sanctions exposure into controlled compliance workflows.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
